Given the user is on the homescreen
When the user taps on the 'My Account' tab
Then the app navigates to the My Account screen displaying user account information

Given the user is on the homescreen
When the user taps on the 'Notifications' tab
Then the app navigates to the Notifications screen showing recent alerts and updates

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user views their account details
Then the app displays the user's personal information and account settings

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user scrolls through the notifications list
Then the app displays all recent notifications and allows the user to view notification details

Given the user is on the homescreen
When the user scrolls through the main content
Then the app displays available booking options and featured destinations

Given the user is on the homescreen
When the user receives a new notification
Then the notifications badge is updated to reflect the new unread notification

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps the back button
Then the app navigates back to the homescreen

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user taps the back button
Then the app navigates back to the homescreen

Given the user is on the homescreen
When the user taps on a featured destination or offer
Then the app displays the details of the selected destination or offer
